---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, enhancement, or quality-of-life improvement for The Last Repo scaffold.
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Before filing: search existing issues and check `docs/specs/` and `docs/plans/`
for related intent. Substantive features should graduate into a spec
(`make new-spec NAME=<scope>/<slug>`) and then a plan
(`make new-plan NAME=<scope>/<slug>`) so the Ralph loop can execute the work.
This issue is the lightweight entry point — the spec/plan is where the work lives.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what is the proposed capability? -->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What pain point or opportunity does this address? Who feels it? Link to any
prior discussion, related bugs, or upstream prior art. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A sketch of the desired behavior. Bullet points are fine. Do not over-design
here — that is what the spec is for. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you considered and why you set them aside. -->

## Scope

- Scope (folder under `apps/`, `services/`, `packages/`, `tools/`, or `platform`):
- Likely surface area (config, scripts, docs, code, CI):
- Breaking change? (yes / no):

## Acceptance signals

<!-- How will we know this is done? Concrete, observable outcomes — not internal
implementation details. The spec will turn these into formal acceptance criteria. -->

-
-

## Ralph-loop fit

<!-- Can this be decomposed into a checklist a fresh-context agent can execute one
task at a time? If not, note why. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related specs, plans, ADRs, screenshots, or design notes. -->
